issues.detail: The skill file lacks explicit, step-by-step instructions for the AI agent, making it ambiguous.
The skill file does not cover all error scenarios or edge cases beyond the provided examples.

scenarios.name: Streaming product list page
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used Marko 4 class/state and client-side fetch with no streaming; treatment used <await|products| from=products> with <@placeholder>/<@then>/<@catch> and <for|product| of=products>.

scenarios.name: Reactive todo list component
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used legacy Marko 4 class/setStateDirty and in-place mutation; treatment used <let/> reactive state, inline onSubmit/onInput/onChange handlers, and immutable reassignment.
